## Title: Fix unreachable code paths and improve error handling in detach procedure

### Summary
The EPS bearer context deactivation logic in the UE NAS stack contained unreachable code due to improperly structured conditional statements. The `is_local` code path had a premature return that prevented the network-initiated deactivation path from ever executing, even when intended. Additionally, the detach accept procedure failed to check return codes from critical operations, potentially masking
